content: how about reproduction frenzy's order recommendation?
reproduction frenzies are "optionally canon", so they're all nonessential and can be read in any order

Monday's over and so is my weekend!!

## Today's SkeyDB Update~

### Builder v2
  - Builder v2 gets a real beta release. Available through https://skeydb.com/builder-v2
    - You may opt in/opt out through the banners, if you select "not now" the banner will disappear until next website update.

### General information about the new builder
*Builder v2 will eventually replace the original builder, I'll let it cook in testing for a week or two first though.

It's main features besides a visual redesign is mostly responsive layouts, it should now feel pretty good to use on both mobile, tablets and desktops.

Teams lists have been reworked to take up less space so that I can fit them in a 2 column grid, so.. less scrolling? 

You can also edit the team slots from the team overview itself, if that tickles your fancy.

There may be some performance issues left to solve, I've felt that it was slower in some parts myself, so that will obviously get looked into.

If anything breaks please let me know 🫥*

### Other Content
  - Saya gets a "full" database release. Affinity Lore, Image relic, etc.
  - URLs have changed from skeydb/#/thing to skeydb/thing, because that's obviously cleaner. Old links still work.
  - Feedback button in the main navbar because.. Why not? Contact me about any concerns!

### Fixes
  - Not a lot, some code work as per usual. Hopefully nothing broke? 😅

Have fun ~
